glosses.ja: 発表する; 公表する

sentences.target: Die Lehrerin wird die Noten morgen bekanntgeben.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈleːʁəʁɪn vɪʁt diː ˈnoːtən ˈmɔʁɡən bəˈkantɡeːbən/

translations.de: Die Lehrerin wird die Noten morgen bekanntgeben.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈleːʁəʁɪn vɪʁt diː ˈnoːtən ˈmɔʁɡən bəˈkantɡeːbən/
translations.en: The teacher will announce the grades tomorrow.
translations.es: La profesora anunciará las notas mañana.
translations.fr: La professeure annoncera les notes demain.
translations.it: La professoressa comunicherà i voti domani.
translations.pt: A professora vai divulgar as notas amanhã.
translations.vi: Cô giáo sẽ công bố điểm vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: De lerares maakt de cijfers morgen bekend.
translations.hu: A tanárnő holnap kihirdeti a jegyeket.
translations.el: Η δασκάλα θα ανακοινώσει τους βαθμούς αύριο.
translations.ja: 先生は明日成績を発表します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine; agrees with the subject noun 'Lehrerin'.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; forms the future with the infinitive 'bekanntgeben'.
Definite article; accusative plural; marks the direct object 'Noten'.
Common noun; plural; accusative; direct object of 'bekanntgeben'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verbal predicate, specifying time.
Lexical verb; separable compound (bekannt + geben); infinitive in clause-final position selected by the auxiliary.

sentences.target: Der Verein will die Termine online bekanntgeben.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈʁaɪ̯n vɪl diː tɛʁˈmiːnə ˈɔnlaɪ̯n bəˈkantɡeːbən/

translations.de: Der Verein will die Termine online bekanntgeben.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈʁaɪ̯n vɪl diː tɛʁˈmiːnə ˈɔnlaɪ̯n bəˈkantɡeːbən/
translations.en: The club wants to announce the dates online.
translations.es: El club quiere publicar las fechas en línea.
translations.fr: Le club veut publier les dates en ligne.
translations.it: Il club vuole pubblicare le date online.
translations.ko: 클럽은 일정을 온라인으로 공지하고 싶어 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 俱乐部想在网上公布日期。
translations.yue: 俱樂部想喺網上公布日期。
translations.pt: O clube quer divulgar as datas online.
translations.he: המועדון רוצה לפרסם את התאריכים באינטרנט.
translations.vi: Câu lạc bộ muốn đăng lịch lên mạng.
translations.ar: يريد النادي إعلان المواعيد عبر الإنترنت.
translations.nl: De vereniging wil de datums online bekendmaken.
translations.hu: A klub online szeretné közzétenni a dátumokat.
translations.hi: क्लब तारीखें ऑनलाइन जारी करना चाहता है.
translations.pl: Klub chce opublikować terminy w internecie.
translations.el: Ο σύλλογος θέλει να ανακοινώσει τις ημερομηνίες στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.nb: Foreningen vil legge ut datoene på nett.
translations.id: Klub ingin mengumumkan tanggal secara online.
translations.sv: Föreningen vill lägga ut datumen på nätet.
translations.ro: Clubul vrea să publice programul online.
translations.da: Foreningen vil lægge datoerne ud på nettet.
translations.ja: クラブは日程をオンラインで発表したい。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; agrees with 'Verein' (subject).
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; selects the bare infinitive 'bekanntgeben'.
Definite article; accusative plural; marks the direct object 'Termine'.
Common noun; plural; accusative; direct object of 'bekanntgeben'.
Adverb; manner/medium; modifies the verb phrase, indicating how/where the announcement occurs.
Lexical verb; separable compound (bekannt + geben); bare infinitive licensed by the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Ich muss die Änderung heute bekanntgeben.

translations.de: Ich muss die Änderung heute bekanntgeben.
translations.en: I have to announce the change today.
translations.es: Tengo que anunciar el cambio hoy.
translations.fr: Je dois annoncer le changement aujourd'hui.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天得公布这项变更。
translations.yue: 我今日要公布呢個更改。
translations.ru: Мне нужно объявить об изменении сегодня.
translations.pt: Tenho que anunciar a mudança hoje.
translations.he: אני צריך להודיע על השינוי היום.
translations.vi: Tôi phải thông báo sự thay đổi hôm nay.
translations.nl: Ik moet de wijziging vandaag bekendmaken.
translations.uk: Мені потрібно оголосити про зміну сьогодні.
translations.hu: Ma be kell jelentenem a változást.
translations.hi: मुझे आज बदलाव की घोषणा करनी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να ανακοινώσω την αλλαγή σήμερα.
translations.nb: Jeg må kunngjøre endringen i dag.
translations.id: Saya harus mengumumkan perubahan itu hari ini.
translations.sv: Jag måste meddela ändringen i dag.
translations.da: Jeg skal offentliggøre ændringen i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は変更を発表しないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary; 1st person singular present; selects the bare infinitive 'bekanntgeben'.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine; marks the direct object 'Änderung'.
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object of 'bekanntgeben'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verbal predicate, specifying time.
Lexical verb; separable compound (bekannt + geben); bare infinitive licensed by the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Der Trainer wird die Aufstellung gleich bekanntgeben.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛːnɐ vɪʁt diː ˈaʊ̯fʃtɛlʊŋ ɡlaɪ̯ç bəˈkantɡeːbən/

translations.de: Der Trainer wird die Aufstellung gleich bekanntgeben.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛːnɐ vɪʁt diː ˈaʊ̯fʃtɛlʊŋ ɡlaɪ̯ç bəˈkantɡeːbən/
translations.en: The coach will announce the lineup shortly.
translations.es: El entrenador dará la alineación en breve.
translations.fr: L'entraîneur va annoncer la composition de l'équipe dans un instant.
translations.it: L'allenatore annuncerà a breve la formazione.
translations.ko: 감독이 곧 선발 명단을 발표할 거예요.
translations.yue: 教練一陣會公布正選名單。
translations.pt: O treinador vai anunciar a escalação daqui a pouco.
translations.he: המאמן יפרסם את ההרכב עוד מעט.
translations.tr: Teknik direktör az sonra kadroyu açıklayacak.
translations.vi: Huấn luyện viên sắp công bố đội hình.
translations.nl: De trainer maakt zo de opstelling bekend.
translations.hu: Az edző mindjárt kihirdeti a kezdőcsapatot.
translations.hi: कोच जल्द ही टीम की सूची घोषित करेगा.
translations.el: Ο προπονητής θα ανακοινώσει σύντομα την ενδεκάδα.
translations.id: Pelatih akan segera mengumumkan susunan pemain.
translations.ro: Antrenorul va anunța în curând echipa de start.
translations.ja: 監督はまもなく先発メンバーを発表します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular masculine; agrees with 'Trainer' (subject).
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; forms the future with the infinitive 'bekanntgeben'.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine; marks the direct object 'Aufstellung'.
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object of 'bekanntgeben'.
Temporal adverb; indicates immediacy; modifies the verbal predicate.
Lexical verb; separable compound (bekannt + geben); infinitive in clause-final position selected by the auxiliary.

jp: Die Lehrerin wird die Noten morgen bekanntgeben.
Der Verein will die Termine online bekanntgeben.
Ich muss die Änderung heute bekanntgeben.
Der Trainer wird die Aufstellung gleich bekanntgeben.

Der Trainer wird die Aufstellung gleich bekanntgeben.

en: The teacher will announce the grades tomorrow.
The club wants to announce the dates online.
I have to announce the change today.
The coach will announce the lineup shortly.
